headline: Built for Xactly Corp
subheadline: AI-powered talent acquisition system to address shortages in sales and tech roles across 16 countries

challenges.title: Talent Shortages
challenges.desc: Xactly needs skilled sales and tech professionals to sustain 8.8% growth. Recruiting in competitive markets delays expansion. Retention suffers from global talent demands.

challenges.title: Regulatory Hurdles
challenges.desc: Operating in 16 countries means navigating diverse employment laws. This complicates hiring processes and increases compliance risks. Data-driven strategies must adapt to these variations.

challenges.title: Employee Retention
challenges.desc: Xactly's expansion requires keeping top talent amid 8.8% growth. High turnover in sales roles impacts performance. Incentives must align with revenue goals to boost loyalty.

challenges.title: Global Collaboration
challenges.desc: Managing teams across 16 countries creates communication gaps. Time zone differences hinder efficient recruitment. Data integration is key to streamline international efforts.

deliverables.title: AI Recruitment Engine
deliverables.desc: Builds a system to identify and attract sales talent using AI analysis of global job markets and integrates with Xactly's revenue platform for data alignment

deliverables.title: Retention Analytics Tool
deliverables.desc: Creates predictive models for employee retention based on performance data and integrates with existing incentive compensation systems to flag at-risk talent

deliverables.title: International Compliance System
deliverables.desc: Develops a framework to handle regulatory requirements across 16 countries and links it to recruitment workflows for seamless global hiring

deliverables.title: Talent Dashboard
deliverables.desc: Constructs a centralized dashboard for real-time tracking of recruitment metrics and connects it to Xactly's AI platform for enhanced decision-making

engagementSteps.title: Assessment Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 1
engagementSteps.desc: Analyze Xactly's current talent needs and integrate initial data from their systems.

engagementSteps.title: Development Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 2
engagementSteps.desc: Build and customize AI tools based on identified challenges.

engagementSteps.title: Implementation Phase
engagementSteps.subtitle: Month 3
engagementSteps.desc: Deploy the system and train teams for ongoing use.

faqItems.question: What is AI-powered sales infrastructure?
faqItems.answer: It uses AI to optimize talent acquisition for sales teams.

faqItems.question: How does it integrate with our systems?
faqItems.answer: It connects directly to Xactly's revenue platform for seamless data flow.

faqItems.question: Is this tailored to our global operations?
faqItems.answer: Yes, it addresses challenges in 16 countries.

faqItems.question: What results can we expect?
faqItems.answer: Improved recruitment efficiency and reduced talent shortages.

faqItems.question: How long is the implementation?
faqItems.answer: Typically three months for full rollout.

faqItems.question: Is there ongoing support?
faqItems.answer: Yes, we provide continuous updates and maintenance.

stackItems.name: Xactly Intelligent Revenue Platform
stackItems.role: Manages sales performance and integrates with AI for talent data

stackItems.name: Salesforce
stackItems.role: Handles CRM needs and syncs recruitment data

stackItems.name: LinkedIn Recruiter
stackItems.role: Sources candidates and feeds into AI analysis

stackItems.name: Google Cloud
stackItems.role: Provides scalable hosting for AI models
